nodes.x: Now these are the divisions of the sons of Aaron. The sons of Aaron; Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
And these are the names of the sons of Aaron; Nadab the firstborn, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
And unto Aaron was born Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
And these are the sons of Aaron; Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son,
And the children of Amram; Aaron, and Moses, and Miriam. The sons also of Aaron; Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
And of the sons of Elam; Mattaniah, Zechariah, and Jehiel, and Abdi, and Jeremoth, and Eliah.
But Nadab and Abihu died before their father, and had no children: therefore Eleazar and Ithamar executed the priest’s office.

And Nadab and Abihu died before the Lord, when they offered strange fire before the Lord, in the wilderness of Sinai, and they had no children: and Eleazar and Ithamar ministered in the priest’s office in the sight of Aaron their father.
And Aaron took him Elisheba, daughter of Amminadab, sister of Naashon, to wife; and she bare him Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
And Nadab and Abihu died, when they offered strange fire before the Lord.
And David distributed them, both Zadok of the sons of Eleazar, and Ahimelech of the sons of Ithamar, according to their offices in their service.
And David called for Zadok and Abiathar the priests, and for the Levites, for Uriel, Asaiah, and Joel, Shemaiah, and Eliel, and Amminadab,
¶ And king David said, Call me Zadok the priest, and Nathan the prophet, and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada. And they came before the king.

And Shemaiah the son of Nethaneel the scribe, one of the Levites, wrote them before the king, and the princes, and Zadok the priest, and Ahimelech the son of Abiathar, and before the chief of the fathers of the priests and Levites: one principal household being taken for Eleazar, and one taken for Ithamar.

These likewise cast lots over against their brethren the sons of Aaron in the presence of David the king, and Zadok, and Ahimelech, and the chief of the fathers of the priests and Levites, even the principal fathers over against their younger brethren.
And of the sons of Zattu; Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, and Jeremoth, and Zabad, and Aziza.
And there were more chief men found of the sons of Eleazar than of the sons of Ithamar; and thus were they divided. Among the sons of Eleazar there were sixteen chief men of the house of their…
Thus were they divided by lot, one sort with another; for the governors of the sanctuary, and governors of the house of God, were of the sons of Eleazar, and of the sons of Ithamar.
And their brethren, according to their generations, nine hundred and fifty and six. All these men were chief of the fathers in the house of their fathers.

5. Now Eli was the first of the family of Ithamar, the other son of
Aaron, that had the government; for the family of Eleazar officiated as
high priest at first, the son still receiving that honor from the father
which Eleazar bequeathed to his son Phineas; after whom Abiezer his son
took the honor, and delivered it to his son, whose name was Bukki, from
whom his son Ozi received it; after whom…
And Eleazar died, and had no sons, but daughters: and their brethren the sons of Kish took them.
Now these are the divisions of the sons of Aaron. The sons of Aaron; Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
Thus were they divided by lot, one sort with another; for the governors of the sanctuary, and governors of the house of God, were of the sons of Eleazar, and of the sons of Ithamar.

And there were more chief men found of the sons of Eleazar than of the sons of Ithamar; and thus were they divided. Among the sons of Eleazar there were sixteen chief men of the house of their fathers, and eight among the sons of Ithamar according to the house of their fathers.

These are the inheritances, which Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the heads of the fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel, divided for an inheritance by lot in Shiloh before the Lord, at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation. So they made an end of dividing the country.
And Phinehas the son of Eleazar was the ruler over them in time past, and the Lord was with him.
And Shemaiah the son of Nethaneel the scribe, one of the Levites, wrote them before the king, and the princes, and Zadok the priest, and Ahimelech the son of Abiathar, and before the chief of the…
And Zadok the son of Ahitub, and Ahimelech the son of Abiathar, were the priests; and Seraiah was the scribe;
And Zadok the son of Ahitub, and Abimelech the son of Abiathar, were the priests; and Shavsha was scribe;

And with them he sent Levites, even Shemaiah, and Nethaniah, and Zebadiah, and Asahel, and Shemiramoth, and Jehonathan, and Adonijah, and Tobijah, and Tob-adonijah, Levites; and with them Elishama and Jehoram, priests.
And when they had called to the king, there came out to them Eliakim the son of Hilkiah, which was over the household, and Shebna the scribe, and Joah the son of Asaph the recorder.
And Sheva was scribe: and Zadok and Abiathar were the priests:
Now the first lot came forth to Jehoiarib, the second to Jedaiah,
¶ And of the priests; Jedaiah, and Jehoiarib, and Jachin,
Shemaiah, and Joiarib, Jedaiah,
Of the priests: Jedaiah the son of Joiarib, Jachin.
And of Joiarib, Mattenai; of Jedaiah, Uzzi;
And it came to pass after these things, that Naboth the Jezreelite had a vineyard, which was in Jezreel, hard by the palace of Ahab king of Samaria.
The third to Harim, the fourth to Seorim,
Harim, Meremoth, Obadiah,
Hariph, Anathoth, Nebai,
The children of Harim, three hundred and twenty.
Of Harim, Adna; of Meraioth, Helkai;
The children of Harim, a thousand and seventeen.
The fifth to Malchijah, the sixth to Mijamin,
Elam the fifth, Jehohanan the sixth, Elioenai the seventh.
Ammiel the sixth, Issachar the seventh, Peulthai the eighth: for God blessed him.
The three and twentieth to Delaiah, the four and twentieth to Maaziah.
Meshullam, Abijah, Mijamin,
Pashur, Amariah, Malchijah,
The seventh to Hakkoz, the eighth to Abijah,
Johanan the eighth, Elzabad the ninth,
And Ahijah, Hanan, Anan,
Attai the sixth, Eliel the seventh,
¶ But Abijah waxed mighty, and married fourteen wives, and begat twenty and two sons, and sixteen daughters.
The ninth to Jeshua, the tenth to Shecaniah,
The eighth to Jeshaiah, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:
In the seventh year of Jehu Jehoash began to reign; and forty years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Zibiah of Beer-sheba.
Jeremiah the tenth, Machbanai the eleventh.
¶ The Levites: the children of Jeshua and Kadmiel, of the children of Hodaviah, seventy and four.
¶ The priests: the children of Jedaiah, of the house of Jeshua, nine hundred seventy and three.
The eleventh to Eliashib, the twelfth to Jakim,
¶ And Jeshua begat Joiakim, Joiakim also begat Eliashib, and Eliashib begat Joiada,
¶ On the sixth day Eliasaph the son of Deuel, prince of the children of Gad, offered:
Of Gad; Eliasaph the son of Deuel.
The ninth to Jeshua, the tenth to Shecaniah,
The thirteenth to Huppah, the fourteenth to Jeshebeab,
Hilkiah the second, Tebaliah the third, Zechariah the fourth: all the sons and brethren of Hosah were thirteen.
The fifteenth to Jeremoth, he, his sons, and his brethren, were twelve:

13. And let them who be of Judah flee unto Jerusalem, unto the
    mountains of the Lord's house.
And it came to pass, that, when Jehu was executing judgment upon the house of Ahab, and found the princes of Judah, and the sons of the brethren of Ahaziah, that ministered to Ahaziah, he slew them.
The fifteenth to Bilgah, the sixteenth to Immer,
And thus endeth the fifteenth year of the reign of the judges over the people of Nephi;

7 Num. xxvii. 18, 23; 1 Tim. It. 14. m Acts, ri. 6; Num. xxvii. 18, 23; 1 Tim. iv. 14. n Psalms, 50, 16 ; Jer. xxiii. 21 ; Acts, xix. 13-16. o James, ii. 14. p Eph. iv. 5. q Mark, xvi. 17, 18. r Heb. xi. s 2 Tim. iii. 1-7. t Jude, iii.
And thus endeth the twenty and fifth year of the reign of the judges over the people of Nephi; and thus endeth the days of Amalickiah.
The seventeenth to Hezir, the eighteenth to Aphses,
The seventeenth to Hezir, the eighteenth to Aphses,
The fifteenth to Bilgah, the sixteenth to Immer,
And by the good hand of our God upon us they brought us a man of understanding, of the sons of Mahli, the son of Levi, the son of Israel; and Sherebiah, with his sons and his brethren, eighteen;
And now it came to pass in the commencement of the nineteenth year of the reign of the judges over the people of Nephi, that Helaman went forth among the people to declare the word unto them.
The nineteenth to Pethahiah, the twentieth to Jehezekel,
And Pethahiah the son of Meshezabeel, of the children of Zerah the son of Judah, was at the king’s hand in all matters concerning the people.
The thirteenth to Huppah, the fourteenth to Jeshebeab,
And the time that Jehu reigned over Israel in Samaria was twenty and eight years.
¶ And in the twentieth year of Jeroboam king of Israel reigned Asa over Judah.
The one and twentieth to Jachin, the two and twentieth to Gamul,
¶ The sons of Simeon after their families: of Nemuel, the family of the Nemuelites: of Jamin, the family of the Jaminites: of Jachin, the family of the Jachinites:
¶ And the sons of Zebulun; Sered, and Elon, and Jahleel.
THE copy of the words of Zebulun, which he enjoined on his sons before he died in the hundred and fourteenth year of his life, two years after the death of Joseph.
The eleventh to Eliashib, the twelfth to Jakim,
And he reared up the pillars before the temple, one on the right hand, and the other on the left; and called the name of that on the right hand Jachin, and the name of that on the left Boaz.
The three and twentieth to Delaiah, the four and twentieth to Maaziah.
Three years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Maachah, the daughter of Abishalom.
The nineteenth to Pethahiah, the twentieth to Jehezekel,
And forty and one years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Maachah, the daughter of Abishalom.
The third, Absalom the son of Maachah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur: the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith:
The children of Delaiah, the children of Tobiah, the children of Nekoda, six hundred forty and two.
These were the orderings of them in their service to come into the house of the Lord, according to their manner, under Aaron their father, as the Lord God of Israel had commanded him.
And Aaron shall offer the Levites before the Lord for an offering of the children of Israel, that they may execute the service of the Lord.

And after that went the Levites in to do their service in the tabernacle of the congregation before Aaron, and before his sons: as the Lord had commanded Moses concerning the Levites, so did they unto them.
So Aaron and his sons did all things which the Lord commanded by the hand of Moses.
These are that Aaron and Moses, to whom the Lord said, Bring out the children of Israel from the land of Egypt according to their armies.

¶ And they went and came to Moses, and to Aaron, and to all the congregation of the children of Israel, unto the wilderness of Paran, to Kadesh; and brought back word unto them, and unto all the congregation, and shewed them the fruit of the land.
¶ And the rest of the sons of Levi were these: Of the sons of Amram; Shubael: of the sons of Shubael; Jehdeiah.

¶ Then the Levites arose, Mahath the son of Amasai, and Joel the son of Azariah, of the sons of the Kohathites: and of the sons of Merari, Kish the son of Abdi, and Azariah the son of Jehalelel: and of the Gershonites; Joah the son of Zimmah, and Eden the son of Joah:
The sons also of Mushi; Mahli, and Eder, and Jerimoth. These were the sons of the Levites after the house of their fathers.
And these were the sons of Levi by their names; Gershon, and Kohath, and Merari.
The sons of Merari; Mahli, and Mushi. And these are the families of the Levites according to their fathers.
And the sons of Merari; Mahali and Mushi: these are the families of Levi according to their generations.
Concerning Rehabiah: of the sons of Rehabiah, the first was Isshiah.
And the sons of Eliezer were, Rehabiah the chief. And Eliezer had none other sons; but the sons of Rehabiah were very many.
And his brethren by Eliezer; Rehabiah his son, and Jeshaiah his son, and Joram his son, and Zichri his son, and Shelomith his son.
The brother of Michah was Isshiah: of the sons of Isshiah; Zechariah.
And the sons of Kenaz; Othniel, and Seraiah: and the sons of Othniel; Hathath.
And Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pashur, the son of Malchijah, and Maasiai the son of Adiel, the son of Jahzerah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Meshillemith, the son of Immer;
Of the Izharites; Shelomoth: of the sons of Shelomoth; Jahath.
Of the sons of Izhar; Shelomith the chief.
¶ The sons of Kohath; Amram, Izhar, Hebron, and Uzziel, four.
¶ And the sons of Izhar; Korah, and Nepheg, and Zichri.
The son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.
And the sons of Shechaniah; Shemaiah: and the sons of Shemaiah; Hattush, and Igeal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.
And the sons of Hebron; Jeriah the first, Amariah the second, Jahaziel the third, Jekameam the fourth.
Of the sons of Hebron; Jeriah the first, Amariah the second, Jahaziel the third, and Jekameam the fourth.
And Jaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri, the sons of Jeroham.
And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.
And the sons of Neariah; Elioenai, and Hezekiah, and Azrikam, three.
And the sons of Kohath; Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
Of the sons of Uzziel; Michah: of the sons of Michah; Shamir.
Of the sons of Uzziel; Michah the first, and Jesiah the second.
Of the sons of Uzziel; Amminadab the chief, and his brethren an hundred and twelve.
And of the sons of Heman; Jehiel, and Shimei: and of the sons of Jeduthun; Shemaiah, and Uzziel.
The son of Zerahiah, the son of Uzzi, the son of Bukki,
The brother of Michah was Isshiah: of the sons of Isshiah; Zechariah.
Whose sisters were Zeruiah, and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah; Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.
Concerning Rehabiah: of the sons of Rehabiah, the first was Isshiah.
And the sons of Pedaiah were, Zerubbabel, and Shimei: and the sons of Zerubbabel; Meshullam, and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister:
And certain of the priests’ sons with trumpets; namely, Zechariah the son of Jonathan, the son of Shemaiah, the son of Mattaniah, the son of Michaiah, the son of Zaccur, the son of Asaph:
And the sons of his brother Helem; Zophah, and Imna, and Shelesh, and Amal.
The sons of Merari were Mahli and Mushi: the sons of Jaaziah; Beno.
¶ The sons of Merari; Mahli, and Mushi. The sons of Mahli; Eleazar, and Kish.
The son of Mahli, the son of Mushi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.
¶ Of Merari was the family of the Mahlites, and the family of the Mushites: these are the families of Merari.
And the sons of Merari by their families; Mahli, and Mushi. These are the families of the Levites according to the house of their fathers.
¶ The sons of Merari by Jaaziah; Beno, and Shoham, and Zaccur, and Ibri.
The sons of Merari were Mahli and Mushi: the sons of Jaaziah; Beno.
¶ And the sons of Naphtali; Jahzeel, and Guni, and Jezer, and Shillem.
¶ The sons of Esau; Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.
Of Mahli came Eleazar, who had no sons.
And Moza begat Binea; and Rephaiah his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son.
Now king Mosiah had no one to confer the kingdom upon, for there was not any of his sons who would accept of the kingdom.
Concerning Kish: the son of Kish was Jerahmeel.
And Kish was the son of Corom.
And Kib was the son of Orihah, who was the son of Jared;
And Kish was the father of Saul; and Ner the father of Abner was the son of Abiel.
And Lib was the son of Kish.
And the sons of Jonathan; Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.
The sons also of Mushi; Mahli, and Eder, and Jerimoth. These were the sons of the Levites after the house of their fathers.
The sons of Mushi; Mahli, and Eder, and Jeremoth, three.
These likewise cast lots over against their brethren the sons of Aaron in the presence of David the king, and Zadok, and Ahimelech, and the chief of the fathers of the priests and Levites, even the…

Also of the sons of Aaron the priests, which were in the fields of the suburbs of their cities, in every several city, the men that were expressed by name, to give portions to all the males among the priests, and to all that were reckoned by genealogies among the Levites.
And David assembled the children of Aaron, and the Levites:
But the king stood forth among them and administered unto them. And they were pacified towards Aaron and those who were with him.
